nasb.text: Then it will come about that any who are left of all the nations that went against Jerusalem will go up from year to year to worship the King, the Lord of hosts, and to celebrate the Feast of Booths.

esv.text: Then everyone who survives of all the nations that have come against Jerusalem shall go up year after year to worship the King, the Lord of hosts, and to keep the Feast of Booths.

cnv.text: 所有前來攻擊耶路撒冷的列國中剩下的人，必年年上來敬拜大君王萬軍之耶和華，並且守住棚節。

ccb.text: 前来攻打耶路撒冷的列国中的幸存者，必每年上来敬拜大君王——万军之耶和华，并且守住棚节。
